title: languas rufescens
intro: Languas rufescens, also known as lesser galangal or Thai ginger, is a type of rhizomatous herb belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Languas rufescens include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and fever, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Languas rufescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also sometimes used in cooking to add flavor and aroma to various dishes.
